label: Red teaming, abuse testing & threat modeling

node.label: Red teaming, abuse testing & threat modeling
node.definition: Red teaming uses threat models and adversarial operators to discover harmful capabilities, unsafe interactions, and bypasses before and after release.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Red teaming, abuse testing & threat modeling is to connect Adversarial robustness & security testing, Observe–plan–act agent loops to downstream capabilities including Evaluation-driven development & release gates.

limitations: Coverage is necessarily incomplete: measured proxies, policies, and test suites cannot enumerate every deployment context or adversary. Its direct dependencies include Adversarial robustness & security testing, Observe–plan–act agent loops.
